title: Non-record: Multi-Agent Orchestrator Framework for Parameter Golf
author: genji0306

data.description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for solution analysis, hypothesis generation, experiment design, and automated testing
Control plane CLI for run management, artifact validation, and experiment synthesis
JSON schemas for structured inter-agent communication across hypotheses, experiments, reflections, and skills
Metric extraction and budget-check helpers for Parameter Golf constraints
Experiment materializer that creates isolated working records from existing leaderboard entries

novel_contributions: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Parameter Golf experimentation
Four-agent workflow: Solution Analyst, Research Lead, Memento Designer, and Experiment Runner
Control plane CLI for run management and experiment synthesis
Structured JSON schemas for inter-agent communication
Metric extraction and budget-check helpers for challenge constraints
Experiment materializer for isolated working records from leaderboard entries
Agent Flow bridge for real-time orchestration visualization
